title: Stable FPS (Pojav + PC)
description: A client-side modpack for Minecraft focused on boosting FPS and improving performance on both PC and Pojav launcher/mojo launcher
body:
![StableFps ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed84bfb8a08f6606f95bc591bdd38b5dd175000c_0.webp)


🌟Stable FPS (Pojav + PC) is a lightweight, client-side optimization modpack designed to deliver smoother gameplay and higher FPS on both PC and Android (PojavLauncher). Whether you're running Minecraft on a low-end computer or a mobile device, this pack includes the best performance-enhancing mods without changing the vanilla gameplay experience.

### 🔑Key Included Mods:

Sodium, Sodium Extra, Reese's Sodium Options – Improves rendering performance

StutterFix-This mod Reduce or eliminate stuttering which is a phenomenon.

Memory Leak Fix-A mod that fixes multiple memory leaks in Minecraft

FerriteCore, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast – Optimizes memory usage and reduces lag spikes

Starlight-This mod for rewriting the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.

Fast Load-Fastload is a relatively simple mod that changes some crucial parts of world loading to speed it up.

LazyDFU & DashLoader-Improve Minecraft Loading Screen.

Enhanced Block Entities-loader which aims to increase the performance of block entity rendering, as well as offer customizability via resource packs.

Noisium-Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience.

ScalableLux-A Fabric mod based on Starlight that improves the performance of light updates in Minecraft.

Entity Culling, More Culling, Smooth Skies – Enhances FPS by skipping off-screen or unnecessary visuals

Very many player-Improve server performance 

Lithium-Lithium is a modern, general-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft which works to improve a number of systems (game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc)

C2me-It Improve Chunk Load Performance 

 threadtweak-Allows adjusting thread priorities for the game's different tasks, and when used properly, can give a nice small performance boost. Maintained version of Smooth Boot


Mod Menu, YACL, Cloth Config – UI mods for better mod management

This modpack is client-side only and fully compatible with vanilla servers. Ideal for both PC and Android users who want the best performance on Minecraft (Fabric).

Environment: Client-side only
Mod Loader: Fabric
